---
title: "Jonathan Barnes"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: Home/Headshot1.png
  image-width: 350px
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jonathanmbarnes
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonathanbarnes516
---
